Description: Optional. Root element of the fields related to a venue - this element is optional (it may not always be returned in the feed). Value (XML only): String giving the venue name; in JSON/JSONP it is returned under shortName instead

attributes.Description: Required. Unique ID (UUID) of the venue

Required. Whether or not the venue is neutral:
* yes (is neutral - the venue is associated with one of the contestants)
* no (not neutral - the venue is associated with one of the contestants)
attributes.Type: String - one of the following: no | yes

attributes.Description: Optional. Unique Opta Core venue ID. Returned only if the feed is queried by Opta Core legacy ID; the attribute is not present otherwise. Empty string if no such value exists.
Optional. Unique Opta venue ID. Returned only if the feed is queried by Opta legacy ID; the attribute is not present otherwise. Empty string if no such value exists.
Required. The long/extended name of the venue
Required. The short name of the venue
